ul.li: Add contrast control for monitors that support it, with sliders in the main UI
Add option to hide contrast sliders from the settings menu
Add contrast control via CLI with --get-contrast, --set-contrast, --increase-contrast, and --decrease-contrast options
Add SetContrast D-Bus method and ShowContrastOSD signal for controlling contrast from external tools and scripts
Add DDC monitor brightness sliders to the GNOME Quick Settings panel
Fix incorrect error messages when CLI arguments are provided in certain orders
Add setup dialog to grant required DDC permissions when running as a Flatpak
Automatically hide the built-in display when the laptop lid is closed
Reload display list immediately when toggling the lid-closed option
Add D-Bus interface for controlling brightness and contrast from external tools and scripts
Add GNOME Shell extension that shows OSD notifications when brightness is changed via DDC
Add Flatpak support
Add Ctrl+Q keyboard shortcut to quit
Debounce brightness slider to prevent laggy behaviour when dragging
Show brightness OSD on all monitors simultaneously
Redesigned UI using GTK4 and libadwaita
New app icon
Improve CLI help text

description.p: Fix installation on Debian and Ubuntu

ul.li: Control brightness and contrast of external DDC/CI monitors
Link multiple monitors to control brightness together
